---
title: "types.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/types.ts"
loc: 13
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.77
style_score: 3.92
intel_score: 8.15
overall_score: 7.24
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
Internal logic only.
